title: Constructor attributes of date and time objects should be in the range of possible values
description: Ensures that constructor attributes of date and time objects are within the range of possible values to prevent errors and unexpected behavior.
message: Constructor attributes of date and time objects should be within the range of possible values.
recommendation: Use appropriate constructor attributes within the range of possible values.

noncompliant.code:
from datetime import datetime

d = datetime(2022, 13, 32)
noncompliant.description: Constructor attribute out of range for month

noncompliant.code:
from datetime import datetime

d = datetime(2022, 2, -1)
noncompliant.description: Constructor attribute out of range for day

compliant.code:
from datetime import datetime

d = datetime(2022, 2, 28)
compliant.description: Constructor attribute within range for day

why_is_this_an_issue: Using constructor attributes of date and time objects outside of their possible range can cause errors and unexpected behavior.
how_to_fix: Ensure that constructor attributes of date and time objects are within the range of possible values.
